title: Youtube Poop: Haruhi Cures Swan Flu
description:
It's been a while since I've uploaded something, so rather than continue to spend endless hours finishing up Spigh Kyds, I thought I'd take care of something I put aside a month ago.  Plus with the new Haruhi episodes out, I felt it would be more festive to release this.

Keep in mind though, it's still gonna be a while before Spigh Kyds is finished, so please bear with me.  Go watch "Star Trek" again or something.  Better yet, see "Up."  Heard that's supposed to be REALLY good.
